name: Transfer Learning Across Policy Regimes in Adaptive Multi-Agent Systems
summary: arXiv:2607.09685v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Policy models often assume that the relationship between a policy instrument and its outcome remains stable across institutional conditions. In ada...
description: arXiv:2607.09685v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Policy models often assume that the relationship between a policy instrument and its outcome remains stable across institutional conditions. In adaptive socio-technical systems this assumption may fail: regulatory change can alter incentives, agents can respond strategically, and the mapping from policy variables to aggregate outcomes can change...
author: Roberto Garrone
